fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-5 launched today; genesis 1hr ago, fork hitting in 2hrs; 2 ELs and 4 CLs participating, Teku onboarding shortly
Decision: bal-devnet-7 is the last BAL-specific devnet; all future EL work moves to unified Glamsterdam devnet track
Glamsterdam devnet-6 scope agreed: EIP-8038, EIP-2780 (repricing, pending final numbers), EIP-8246 (self-destruct burn removal), EIP-7997 (deterministic deployer); EIP-7610 deferred

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8131 + EIP-8279 proposed for Hegota: price 7702 authorizations and blob version hashes at floor; reduces worst-case block size by ~40%; formula becomes gas_limit/64
EIP-7979 (EOF successor) update: validation algorithm moved on-chain so clients don't implement it; no separate code sections (open design issue flagged); breakout call to be scheduled
EIP-8222 (lean staking / base-layer privacy pool via two-phase beacon deposits) presented for feedback only; not targeting Hegota; requires mature LeanVM proof system first
EIP-7851 + EIP-8151 proposed for Hegota: permanent EOA delegation (EF02) and EC Recover deactivation to fully deprecate EOA key; discussion suggests a new generic SETCODEFROM opcode may be preferable

testing_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-7 kept alive for benchmarking; EIP-8038 latest numbers available but re-benchmarking needed with latest optimizations before finalizing

organizational.highlight: Next ACDC call shifted to 11:00 UTC (one-off time change, possibly recurring if Australian attendance warrants it)

action_items.action: EL client teams: review engine API changes (PRs #796, #786) and onboard to Glamsterdam devnet-5
Schedule EIP-7979 breakout call once draft is merged; coordinate timing with Hegota proposal window

decisions.decision: bal-devnet-7 is the final BAL-specific devnet; no bal-devnet-8 planned
Glamsterdam devnet-6 scope: EIP-8038, EIP-2780 (preliminary values), EIP-8246, EIP-7997 included; EIP-7610 excluded pending Gary's input
Engine API: Marius's proposal adopted over Barnabas's; teams that implemented Barnabas's version should migrate

targets.target: Next ACDC call: 11:00 UTC next week (shifted time)
